channel.title: Spring Lake Surf Conditions — Remsen Ave
channel.description: Daily 7-day surf forecast for Remsen Ave & Ocean Ave N, Spring Lake, NJ

item.title: 7-Day Surf Forecast — 2026-07-02 to 2026-07-08
item.description: 0 IDEAL, 3 INTERESTING, 4 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days. Thu 2026-07-02: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.7 ft @ 5.5 sec, wind 4 kt SW, water 61°F. Low tide: 03:32, 15:27. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.7 ft); period too short (5.5 sec). Fri 2026-07-03: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 09:00, 2.3 ft @ 6.0 sec, wind 4 kt NNW, water 63°F. Low tide: 04:07, 16:04. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Sat 2026-07-04: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.8 ft @ 6.2 sec, wind 4 kt NW, water 66°F. Low tide: 04:41, 16:42. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Sun 2026-07-05: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.7 ft @ 6.1 sec, wind 5 kt NW, water 66°F. Low tide: 05:15, 17:26. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Mon 2026-07-06: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 1.7 ft @ 5.5 sec, wind 11 kt E, water 69°F. Low tide: 05:54, 18:21. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: period too short (5.5 sec); wind direction off (E). Tue 2026-07-07: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.8 ft @ 4.8 sec, wind 11 kt E, water 69°F. Low tide: 06:40, 19:31. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.8 ft); period too short (4.8 sec); wind direction off (E). Wed 2026-07-08: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.5 ft @ 5.7 sec, wind 10 kt NE, water 70°F. Low tide: 07:37, 20:45. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.5 ft); period too short (5.7 sec); wind direction off (NE).
item.content:encoded:
0 IDEAL, 3 INTERESTING, 4 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days.

  • Thu 2026-07-02: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.7 ft @ 5.5 sec, wind 4 kt SW, water 61°F. Low tide: 03:32, 15:27. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.7 ft); period too short (5.5 sec).
  • Fri 2026-07-03: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 09:00, 2.3 ft @ 6.0 sec, wind 4 kt NNW, water 63°F. Low tide: 04:07, 16:04. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Sat 2026-07-04: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.8 ft @ 6.2 sec, wind 4 kt NW, water 66°F. Low tide: 04:41, 16:42. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Sun 2026-07-05: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.7 ft @ 6.1 sec, wind 5 kt NW, water 66°F. Low tide: 05:15, 17:26. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Mon 2026-07-06: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 1.7 ft @ 5.5 sec, wind 11 kt E, water 69°F. Low tide: 05:54, 18:21. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: period too short (5.5 sec); wind direction off (E).
  • Tue 2026-07-07: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.8 ft @ 4.8 sec, wind 11 kt E, water 69°F. Low tide: 06:40, 19:31. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.8 ft); period too short (4.8 sec); wind direction off (E).
  • Wed 2026-07-08: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.5 ft @ 5.7 sec, wind 10 kt NE, water 70°F. Low tide: 07:37, 20:45. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.5 ft); period too short (5.7 sec); wind direction off (NE).
